description: One file per project. Append one entry per proposal. All entries reviewed at stage gates. No template changes apply until explicitly approved by Lefty.

entries._comment: SCHEMA REFERENCE — copy and fill this object for each proposal
WORKED EXAMPLE — from AI Governance Template v1.0 project

entries.after:
### FR-001
> Concrete example: For a CLI snake game, FR-001 should describe the startup mode question (Greenfield vs Brownfield), not game mechanics. Lead with one real scenario before writing abstract rules.
- Description:
- Normal flow:
- Error handling:
entries.reasoning: During Stage 2 on this project, the FR-001 wording was too abstract and required multiple walkthrough iterations before the intent was clear. Adding a concrete example line at the top of each FR block in the template would have reduced that back-and-forth significantly.
